name: Natalie Jones
school: Department of Astronomy and Planetary Science
focus: Geomorphology • Microbial sediment processes • Mars analog research
bio: Natalie Jones is a graduate researcher whose work explores how extracellular polymeric substances (EPS), sticky biopolymers produced by common soil microorganisms, influence sediment strength, cohesion, and landform development on Earth and Mars. Her research connects geomorphology, sediment transport, and astrobiology, with applications ranging from unvegetated river systems and dunes to the search for biosignatures and landscape-forming processes on the Martian surface.
